name: Greek Pasta Salad
recipeIngredient: 1 cup red bell pepper, cut into strips
3/4 cup pepperoni slices, cut into strips
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large bowl, whisk together olive oil, red wine vinegar, garlic powder, basil, oregano, pepper, and sugar until well combined.
2. Add the cooked pasta, sliced mushrooms, cherry tomatoes, red bell pepper, crumbled feta cheese, chopped green onion, black olives, and pepperoni strips to the bowl.
3. Toss gently until all ingredients are evenly coated with the dressing.
4. Cover the bowl and refrigerate for 2 hours or overnight to allow flavors to meld and salad to chill thoroughly.
5. Serve chilled. Makes approximately 10 cups.
